steps.title: Test the heliostat prediction
steps.content: Ortega's team used 38 to 42 heliostats, and the fastest solar roasting took six minutes. The hypothesis predicts that using more heliostats will reduce that roasting time.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant support
steps.content:
• Choice A concerns temperature distribution, not whether more heliostats reduce time.
  • Choice C concerns flavor preference, not roasting speed.
  • Choice D concerns peeling, not time required to roast.
The remaining choice shows that 50 heliostats produce results in fewer than six minutes. The answer is B.
